mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_student_task ( student_id, task_id, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.studentId}, #{item.taskId}, #{item.status}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tb_task t WHERE t.is_published = 1 -- 只查已发布任务 AND t.id NOT IN ( -- 排除该学生已完成的任务 SELECT task_id FROM tb_student_task WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND status = 1 -- status=1表示已完成 ) -- 任务可见范围：校级/本院级/本班级（按 ID） AND ( t.level = '校级' OR (t.level = '院级' AND t.college_id = #{collegeId}) OR (t.level = '班级' AND t.class_id = #{classId}) ) ORDER BY t.create_time DESC

SELECT sc.student_id, s.nickname AS student_nickname, sc.college, sc.clazz, SUM(t.score) AS total_score, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(t.score) DESC) AS `rank` FROM tb_student_task st JOIN tb_task t ON st.task_id = t.id JOIN tb_student s ON st.student_id = s.id JOIN tb_student_class sc ON st.student_id = sc.student_id WHERE st.status = 1 AND st.submit_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY) GROUP BY sc.student_id, s.nickname, sc.college, sc.clazz ORDER BY total_score DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT sc.student_id, s.nickname AS student_nickname, sc.college, sc.clazz, SUM(t.score) AS total_score, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(t.score) DESC) AS `rank` FROM tb_student_task st JOIN tb_task t ON st.task_id = t.id JOIN tb_student s ON st.student_id = s.id JOIN tb_student_class sc ON st.student_id = sc.student_id WHERE st.status = 1 AND sc.college = #{college} GROUP BY sc.student_id, s.nickname, sc.college, sc.clazz ORDER BY total_score DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT sc.student_id, s.nickname AS student_nickname, sc.college, sc.clazz, SUM(t.score) AS total_score, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(t.score) DESC) AS `rank` FROM tb_student_task st JOIN tb_task t ON st.task_id = t.id JOIN tb_student s ON st.student_id = s.id JOIN tb_student_class sc ON st.student_id = sc.student_id WHERE st.status = 1 AND sc.college = #{college} AND st.submit_time >= #{startTime} AND st.submit_time <= #{endTime} GROUP BY sc.student_id, s.nickname, sc.college, sc.clazz ORDER BY total_score DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT t.id AS taskId, t.title AS taskTitle, sc.college, sc.clazz, COUNT(*) AS totalStudents, SUM(CASE WHEN st.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completedStudents FROM tb_task t INNER JOIN tb_student_task st ON st.task_id = t.id INNER JOIN tb_student_class sc ON st.student_id = sc.student_id
WHERE t.id IN #{id} AND ( t.level = '校级' OR (t.level = '院级' AND sc.college_id = t.college_id) OR (t.level = '班级' AND sc.class_id = t.class_id) )
GROUP BY t.id, t.title, sc.college, sc.clazz
